title: Spread: Hawks (-1.5)
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 31 at 7:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Hawks" if the Hawks win the game by 2 or more points.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Pacers". If the game ends in a tie, this market will resolve to "Pacers".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
